overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a student wizard exploring the castle interior, ascending spiral staircases, passing through grand halls with suits of armor, entering the iconic candlelit Great Hall, and exiting to an outdoor courtyard with mountain views at golden hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark stone spiral staircase with ghost encounter

events.description: translucent ghostly figure appears and walks up the stairs passing through the player character

agents.ego_description: walking up a dimly lit stone spiral staircase while observing a ghostly figure approaching

notable_agents.action: ghostly translucent figure walking up the stairs and passing through the player

entered.detail: worn stone steps curving upward in a tight spiral
thick cylindrical stone columns supporting the staircase structure
translucent white spectral entity resembling a medieval figure
warm orange torchlight mounted on the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a dark, narrow stone spiral staircase illuminated by warm wall sconces. A translucent ghostly figure appears mid-staircase, walking upward and passing through the player character in a supernatural encounter.

events.description: ambient light increases slightly as approaching the door to the grand staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow stone corridor toward a wooden door at the end of the hall

entered.detail: simple dark wooden bench against the corridor wall
heavy wooden door with metal studs marking the transition to the grand staircase
ornate iron lantern hanging from the corridor ceiling
gothic stone arch framing the doorway ahead

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow stone corridor featuring a wooden bench and hanging lanterns, approaching a heavy wooden door that leads to the grand staircase area.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase hall with gothic architecture

events.description: exits narrow corridor into a large open hall with a grand bifurcated staircase

agents.ego_description: ascending the wide stone steps of a grand staircase flanked by gothic railings

entered.detail: wide bifurcated stone staircase with ornate wooden railings splitting left and right
large stone sculpture of a crouching wolf guardian at the stair base
intricate stone balustrades with pointed arch patterns
high arched windows with diamond-patterned glass letting in natural light
full plate armor standing on display

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a magnificent grand hall featuring a bifurcated staircase, tall gothic windows, and a prominent stone wolf statue. Natural light filters through the high windows as the character ascends the wide stone steps.

events.description: character opens large wooden double doors to proceed through the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through upper level corridors and passing other students in uniform

notable_agents.action: student in dark school robes walking in the opposite direction through the corridor

entered.detail: tall carved oak doors with iron handles separating corridor sections
upholstered bench with red velvet seating against the stone wall
rough-hewn stone blocks with gothic architectural details

segments.scene_description: The character navigates through upper corridors with stone walls and red benches, passing other students in school uniforms while opening wooden double doors to progress deeper into the castle.

agents.ego_description: walking down a long carpeted hall lined with suits of armor toward the Great Hall entrance

entered.detail: massive double doors with intricate gothic carvings leading to the Great Hall
medieval full plate armor statues standing at attention along the walls
fluted stone columns supporting the high vaulted ceiling
ornate red carpet runner with gold patterns covering the stone floor

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a grand processional hall with a red patterned carpet, flanked by stone pillars and suits of armor, approaching the massive carved wooden doors that lead to the Great Hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall with floating candles and dining tables

events.description: opens large wooden doors and enters the vast candlelit Great Hall
dramatic golden sunlight streams through tall stained glass windows illuminating the hall

agents.ego_description: entering the Great Hall and walking between long dining tables filled with students

entered.detail: hundreds of candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination throughout the hall
lengthy wooden house tables lined with students and food
tall arched windows with intricate leaded glass patterns casting colored light
backless wooden seating along the sides of the dining tables

segments.scene_description: The character opens the massive doors and enters the iconic Great Hall, where countless floating candles illuminate the space above long dining tables filled with students. Golden afternoon light streams through the tall gothic stained glass windows, creating dramatic beams across the marble floor.

events.description: exits the Great Hall through large doors into an outdoor stone courtyard

agents.ego_description: exiting the castle building into an outdoor courtyard and descending stone steps toward the grounds

notable_agents.action: distant figure in orange robes walking down the path ahead

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone tower with narrow windows part of the castle structure
octagonal stone pavilion with a pointed roof in the courtyard garden
distant misty mountains surrounding the castle valley
ornate iron and stone lamppost with multiple lanterns
neatly manicured cone-shaped topiary trees lining the pathway
weathered cobblestone paving stones covering the courtyard floor

segments.scene_description: The character exits the castle into a sunlit stone courtyard with views of distant mountains, descending cobblestone steps past manicured topiary and stone architecture toward the castle grounds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the dim, supernatural depths of the castle's interior toward the expansive, sun-drenched vistas of the outdoor grounds. It begins on a dark, narrow stone spiral staircase where a translucent ghost passes through the character, before moving through a lantern-lit corridor and emerging into a magnificent grand hall filled with natural light and gothic architecture. The camera then navigates through upper corridors populated by students and down a processional hall lined with suits of armor, leading directly to the massive carved doors of the Great Hall. As these doors open, the scene expands into a vast space illuminated by floating candles and dramatic beams of golden afternoon light streaming through stained glass. Finally, the movement carries the character out of the castle and down cobblestone steps into a bright stone courtyard overlooking distant mountains.
